reviews.author: Myra Bhasin
reviews.body: Bracelet ka design simple hone ke baad bhi bahut premium look deta hai. Casual aur formal dono outfits ke saath suit karta hai.

reviews.author: Pihu Maini
reviews.body: Bracelet dekhkar koi nahi keh sakta ki itna affordable hai. Bahut hi expensive look deta hai.

reviews.author: Aariz Bansal
reviews.body: Har bead ko bahut carefully place kiya gaya hai. Bracelet ki detailing dekhkar craftsmanship ka andaaza lag jata hai.

reviews.author: Vihaan Gera
reviews.body: Bracelet wrist par perfectly fit hua aur long hours tak pehenne ke baad bhi heavy feel nahi hua.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text: Pyrite Wealth Energy: Pyrite is known as the Money Magnet Crystal, supporting wealth attraction, confidence, success, and abundance energy. Obsidian Protection Power: Obsidian is known for grounding, nazar protection, emotional stability, and shielding negative energy. 24K Gold-Toned Rice Chain: Premium rice chain design gives the bracelet a sleek, textured, and luxurious golden wrist look. Lobster Lock Closure: Designed with a secure lobster lock for easy wearing and comfortable everyday use. • • Designed with Care. Crafted with Soul.
